items.name: Ahmet Yilmaz
items.text: We chose Efe Construction for our PVC window replacement. Both quality materials and professional craftsmanship. Very satisfied.

items.name: Fatma Demir
items.text: Our glass balcony system turned out amazing. We can comfortably use our balcony even in winter. Thanks Efe Construction!

items.name: Mehmet Kaya
items.text: Our pergola system turned out exactly as we wanted. Thanks to the bioclimatic pergola, our terrace has become a living space.

items.text: We had insect screens installed on all apartment windows. They were very meticulous during measurement and installation.

items.question: How long do PVC windows last?
items.answer: Quality PVC window systems can serve trouble-free for 25-30 years under proper care and usage conditions. This period can be extended even further with regular maintenance.

items.question: Do glass balcony systems provide adequate protection in winter?
items.answer: Glass balcony systems provide effective protection against wind, rain, and dust. With double-glazed options, you can comfortably use your balcony during winter months as well.

items.question: What is a bioclimatic pergola?
items.answer: A bioclimatic pergola is a smart shading system that allows you to control sunlight and air circulation with its movable louver structure. Motorized versions can be controlled with a remote.

items.question: How long does insect screen installation take?
items.answer: For standard window insect screens, measurement and installation are usually completed within the same day. Time may vary for door screens and special systems.

items.question: Do you provide free site inspection?
items.answer: Yes, we offer free site inspection and price quotation for all our services. You can reach us by phone or through the contact form.

items.question: What is the warranty period?
items.answer: We provide a minimum 2-year workmanship warranty on all our products and services. Product warranties range from 5-10 years depending on the brand.
